query:
SELECT 'Categories' as entity, COUNT(*) as count FROM categories WHERE establishmentId = 210006
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Products', COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 210006
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Complement Groups', COUNT(*) FROM complementGroups WHERE productId IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 210006)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Complement Items', COUNT(*) FROM complementItems WHERE groupId IN (SELECT id FROM complementGroups WHERE productId IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 210006));
